ds1302_setup.message0: DS1302 initialization %1 CE pin %2 IO pin %3 SCLK pin %4
ds1302_setup.tooltip: Initialize the DS1302 RTC clock module and set the CE, IO, SCLK pins

ds1302_set_write_protect.tooltip: Enable or disable the write protection feature of the DS1302

ds1302_set_halt.tooltip: Stop or start the DS1302 clock oscillator

ds1302_get_time.tooltip: Read the current time from DS1302 and return the Time object

ds1302_set_time.message0: %1 Set Time Year %2 Month %3 Day %4 Hour %5 Minute %6 Second %7 Week %8
ds1302_set_time.tooltip: Set the time of DS1302 (year, month, day, hour, minute, second, day of the week)

ds1302_get_year.tooltip: Get the year of the Time object (2000-2099)

ds1302_get_month.tooltip: Get the month (1-12) of the Time object

ds1302_get_day.tooltip: Get the date of the Time object (1-31)

ds1302_get_hour.tooltip: Get the hour of the Time object (0-23)

ds1302_get_minute.tooltip: Get the minutes of the Time object (0-59)

ds1302_get_second.tooltip: Get the seconds of the Time object (0-59)

ds1302_get_weekday.tooltip: Get the day of the week of the Time object (1=Sunday, 2=Monday, ..., 7=Saturday)

ds1302_write_ram.tooltip: Write a byte to the RAM of DS1302 (address range 0-30)

ds1302_read_ram.tooltip: Read a byte from the DS1302's RAM (address range 0-30)
